steps.title: Compare career starts
steps.content: The question asks for the order in which the lighthouse keepers began their careers. The notes show Eleanor M. Clark started in 1817 and Miriam J. Ellis started in 1883.

steps.title: Reject wrong focus
steps.content: Choice A compares when their careers ended. Choice C incorrectly places both lighthouse keepers in Connecticut from 1817 to 1878. Choice D only states the general importance of lighthouse keepers. The remaining choice clearly says Ellis began years after Clark. The answer is B.
